Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you swirl seafood ramen around six times clockwise and six times the other way without spilling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you do that with Hagakure's ramen, I heard you'll end up with the person you like![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you drink a whole bowl of Hagakure's soup, you can see the word "WIN" at the bottom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you trace those letters with your chopsticks, I hear it makes you stronger in fights![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}At Hagakure, try ordering cold ramen by saying "cobra men" to the waiter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If he understands what you said, I heard you won't get heatstroke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Order ice cream at the sweets shop and eat it without stopping, even if you get a brain freeze.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you do that three times in a row... you'll get a stomachache. I mean, duh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}When you order a pork cutlet set and there's cabbage on top...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Write a dollar sign on top of it, and I hear your allowance will increase![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}When you order a medium beef bowl, order a raw egg with it and drop it onto the beef bowl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you can get the egg in the middle of the bowl, I heard you'll become more popular in school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Order the large fries at Wilduck Burger and make a "W" out of four of them, or an "M" if you're a girl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Think of the one you love and eat the fries. Then you can't fail![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Those people who just stare at you frighten me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}But it's okay! I'll order the chili garlic fries and make a cross! It drives them away... or so I hear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}I heard when you buy takoyaki from Octopia and share it with your loved one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You'll break up. So, how's your relationship going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}If you do something bad to the sweets shop's mascot, Azuki-chan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You'll lose control of your bladder! She might be cute, but don't think you can deface her![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You only get the special miso soup if you order the fried shrimp set.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}I hear that sometimes, you'll find a real pearl in that soup![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}I heard if you eat a bowl of ramen without setting it on the table...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}You'll be a master thing-holder. But it must be tough, since it's so heavy and hot...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}My mom is saying all this weird stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Something about the End, or the Salvation, or something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}I don't understand adults.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}Now my dad says all that weird stuff, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}He's right there with my mom, saying the end is coming...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}I don't wanna go home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}My mom and dad keep saying this weird phrase...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 411}"Believe in Nyx-sama and be saved!"[n]{f 1 1}
